revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Wallachia | flag alias = Flag of Wallachia.svg | flag alias-1360 = Coa Romania Country Wallachia History 2 (14th century).svg | flag alias-1390 = MirceaCelBatranSeal1390.png | flag alias-1545 = Emblem of Wallachia under Radu Paisie (Dimitrije Ljubavić's Molitvenik, Jan 10, 1545).png | flag alias-1608 = Emblem of Wallachia under Radu Șerban, 1608.svg | flag alias-1624 = Emblem of Wallachia under Alexandru Coconul, 1624.png | flag alias-1632 = Coat of arms of Wallachia under Matei Basarab (Marcus Boschinius version).svg | flag alias-1658 = SteagMihneaIII.jpg | flag alias-1667 = Emblem of Wallachia under Radu Leon, 1667.png | flag alias-1683 = Emblem of arms of Wallachia under Șerban Cantacuzino, 1683.png | flag alias-1700 = Naval Ensign of Wallachia.svg | flag alias-1734 = Coat of arms of Wallachia under Grigore II Ghica.png | flag alias-1758 = Banner of Scarlat Ghica as Prince of Wallachia, 1758.svg | flag alias-1772 = Реверс с российской монеты 1 пара 3 денги 1772.svg | flag alias-1781 = Coat of arms of Wallachia under Alexander Ypsilantis, 1781.png | flag alias-1795 = Dionisie Eclesiarhul - Coat of arms of Wallachia, 1795.png | flag alias-1802 = Banner of Alexander Soutzos as Prince of Wallachia.svg | flag alias-1806 = Constantine Ypsilantis' banner.svg | flag alias-1812 = John George Caradja's seal, 1818.png | flag alias-1818 = Banner of Alexander Soutzos as Prince of Wallachia.svg | flag alias-1821 = Flag of Tudor Vladimirescu's Revolution (1821).png | flag alias-1831 = Flag of Wallachia 1831.svg | flag alias-1834 = Civil ensign of Wallachia, 1834–1861.svg | flag alias-1848 = Flag of Wallachian Revolution of 1848, horizontal stripes.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Wallachia.svg | link alias-naval = Wallachian Navy | flag alias-naval-1700 = Naval Ensign of Wallachia.svg | flag alias-naval-1858 = Flag of Wallachia 1858.svg | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Wallachia.svg | link alias-navy = Wallachian Navy | link alias-military =Wallachian military forces | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1360 | var2 = 1390 | var3 = 1545 | var4 = 1608 | var5 = 1624 | var6 = 1632 | var7 = 1658 | var8 = 1667 | var9 = 1683 | var10 = 1700 | var11 = 1734 | var12 = 1758 | var13 = 1772 | var14 = 1781 | var15 = 1795 | var16 = 1802 | var17 = 1806 | var18 = 1812 | var19 = 1818 | var20 = 1821 | var21 = 1831 | var22 = 1834 | var23 = 1848 | var24 = naval-1700 | var25 = naval-1858 | related1 = Kingdom of Romania | related2 = Romania </noinclude>
}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Wallachia here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Wallachia for full history.
